description: Add auto-deploy webhook functionality and fix pnpm compatibility by moving onlyBuiltDependencies to .npmrc
steps: Remove pnpm field from package.json and create .npmrc with onlyBuiltDependencies config
Create deploy.sh script at project root
Create server/src/routes/webhook.ts with GitHub webhook handler
acceptance_criteria: package.json no longer has pnpm field
.npmrc exists with onlyBuiltDependencies for better-sqlite3 and esbuild
webhook.ts handles GitHub push events with signature verification
Webhook route is registered at /api/webhook in index.ts
findings: All changes implemented successfully. pnpm onlyBuiltDependencies moved from package.json to .npmrc. deploy.sh created and made executable. Webhook route created at /api/webhook with GitHub signature verification and push-to-main auto-deploy. Build and all 9 tests pass.
